ops.body: Stays deferred (decision reconfirmed in the v0.31.0 follow-ups plan): the semantic leg stays exact — bit-parity with semble's exact/linear Vicinity backend; the aggregate p50 gate passes without ANN (re-verified 2026-07-23: warm p50 1.384 ms vs 3.556 ms gate). ANN would break bit-parity and require a full NDCG re-gate. Revisit only if large-repo latency (zig: 12.6 ms p50 @ 26K chunks) becomes a real complaint.
